nasb.text: Now David’s two wives had been taken captive, Ahinoam the Jezreelitess and Abigail the widow of Nabal the Carmelite.

esv.text: David’s two wives also had been taken captive, Ahinoam of Jezreel and Abigail the widow of Nabal of Carmel.

cnv.text: 大衛的兩個妻子，耶斯列人亞希暖和作過拿八妻子的迦密人亞比該，也都被擄去了。

ccb.text: 大卫的两个妻子耶斯列人亚希暖和拿八的遗孀迦密人亚比该也一起被掳走了。
